[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A blurry portrait of a man is shown with a large, bold text overlay across the bottom of the image.

Main Subject:
A person with short, dark hair appears in close-up, filling most of the frame from the chest up, facing forward with a neutral expression.

Setting:
The background is indoors and heavily out of focus, with what looks like horizontal and blocky shapes suggesting a wall or shelving.

Visual Details:
The image has a low-resolution, soft-focus look with warm, orange-tinted lighting. The person’s face and upper torso dominate the composition, centered horizontally. At the bottom, there is a prominent overlay of large, uppercase text in white with a dark outline or shadow, spanning nearly the full width of the image.

Visible Text:
KURANGIN EXTRAS

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up, blurred photo of a man against an indistinct indoor background. Large bold text is overlaid at the bottom, reading “KURANGIN EXTRAS.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

KURVANG EXH48 [unclear]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** `KURVANG EXH48 [unclear]`

# Notes

- The exact wording after “KURVANG” and the characters after “EXH48” are unclear due to blur.
- If you upload a higher-resolution screenshot, I can re-check the unclear parts.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
